name: Frivolous Submission Penalty Safe Harbor

eligibility.description: Applies to taxpayers who have filed a submission identified by the IRS as frivolous but act within the 30-day grace period to retract it.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can avoid a $5,000 penalty for specified frivolous submissions (like installment agreement requests or collection due process hearings) by withdrawing the submission within 30 days of IRS notice.
